Name: Marian Hegemony
Description: The Marian Hegemony is a major Periphery state rimward and anti-spinward of Terra. The Hegemony models itself on the ancient Terran Roman Empire, an absolute monarchy, ruled by an Imperator and later a Caesar. The society is heavily caste based, it is also one of the largest Periphery nation to practice slavery, and openly condones it. Most slaves are prisoners of war, however, as it is forbidden to buy or sell a citizen of the Hegemony. While trade flows between the Hegemony and the Free World League, Marian raids have kept relationships chilly. The Marian Hegemony has almost no good relations with the other Periphery nations. The only Periphery nation to have any good relations with the Hegemony is the Circinus Federation, primarily due to their mutual dislike of the Illyrian Palatinate.
ReputationStatements: Do not mistake Marian hospitality for equality. You are barbarian contractors, not citizens, and you will serve.
You are being granted an undeserved opportunity to serve imperial interests. See that you do not squander it.
The Hegemony prefers disciplined legionaries to hired mercenaries. Yet even Rome occasionally employs auxiliaries.
Mercenary, I have an imperial task to impress upon you. The Caesar expects order restored to this region without delay.
Reliable auxiliaries are valuable to any empire. Complete the contract and imperial compensation will follow.
Hail Commander. You serve Marian interests effectively and without unnecessary theatrics. I have saved this contract as reward for your services.
Hail Commander. If all our Legions were as effective as you, we would have an empire to match any of the Successor Houses. I have this contract that I would entrust to no other.
MissionSuccessStatements: Order has been restored through strength, as it has throughout history. You served the Caesar well today. Few mercenary companies earn such praise.
GoodFaithFailureStatements: Commander, if you were a Legionnaire I would have you flogged for your incompetence.  However, the contract stipulates partial payment for partial completion, so it has been done.
BadFaithFailureStatements: I have half a mind to enslave you and your company for such insolence! Leave my presence before I change my mind.
